name: Spawn
description: Turn a number of mana dice to the indicated faces.

name: Expend X
description: Reroll the indicated dice to trigger the ability.

name: Haste
description: The card can be tapped on the turn it is played.

name: Summon
description: Move a card to the battlefield without playing it.

name: Protect
description: Prevent a unit from being targeted by your opponent. A protector cannot be protected.

name: Vulnerable
description: This card cannot receive protection.

name: Destroy
description: Move a card to the graveyard.

name: Banish
description: Remove a card from the game.

name: Assault X
description: Destroy a unit whose power plus armor is X or less.

name: Assassinate X
description: Assault X, bypassing protection and invisibility.

name: Seize
description: Move a unit to its opponent's battlefield.

name: Overkill X
description: Triggers when an assault deals X excess damage.

name: Disloyal
description: The card is played to your opponent's battlefield.

name: Chaos X
description: Triggers if there are at least X unique mana types.

name: Paired
description: Triggers if you play or control a second copy of this card.

name: Echo
description: Before the mulligan phase, draw this card from your graveyard and give it doomed.

name: Imbibe
description: Triggers whenever a liquor card is equipped.

name: Devour
description: Destroy a unit and boost own power by its power.

name: Plunder X
description: Gain X points when the unit is destroyed.

name: Devotion
description: Triggers if your starting deck contains no unaffiliated cards.

name: Veteran
description: Increase this unit's power at the start of the second and third round.

name: Purify
description: Remove all statuses from a unit.

name: Lock
description: Status that disables all of a card's abilities.

name: Poison
description: Status that destroys a unit if inflicted a second time.

name: Doomed
description: Status that banishes the card when it leaves the battlefield.

name: Bounty
description: Status that may be inflicted multiple times. Yields mana for your opponent when the unit is destroyed.

name: Stalwart
description: At round end, units with this status are purified instead of destroyed. Equipment is also removed.

name: Immune
description: Status that prevents receiving additional statuses.

name: Invisible
description: Status that prevents the unit from being targeted.
